text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Screeeeech!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day we leave for Europe has finally arrived. If
we want to enter an international G1 race, it's
best to run in a lighter race first.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Heheh. We won't be back till fall, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Let's make sure we bring a big trophy back with
us as a souvenir.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Well, let's head out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Pop!
choice_data_list: I think I just heard a strange sound.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Now I've done it...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I messed up. I made a really cool turn around that
corner, and ended up twisting my ankle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wee woo wee woo...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: How can you be so dumb!?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet's voice seems to pierce through the
walls of the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You made a huge deal out of going abroad! You
even got me involved in it and caused a huge
commotion!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: And then you twist your ankle, not even during training, but at the airport?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, I get it. I'm pathetic. Sorry.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Things like this happen sometimes. You can't
have sunshine every day.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm not talking about sunshine! What are you
going to do now?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: That's... up to Trainer.
choice_data_list:
We're gonna have to put the trip on hold for
now.

We're gonna have to put the trip on hold for
now.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Well, I guess there's no helping it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We have no choice but to rest for a few days and
then start reorganizing ourselves for autumn.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: But... this might be a good thing for me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
If you went abroad and never came back, we
might've never settled our unfinished business.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
When you said you were going to the Derby, I felt
like you were just some kind of aimless, impulsive
punk.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I thought I'd close the book on our rivalry right
there. But then...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I saw you in the Derby and felt like I lost. You
were on a whole different level.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I realized then that there was no way you could
do what you did unless you were truly strong
inside. I was absolutely speechless...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Really? I coulda sworn you said ya weren't even
gonna watch the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I know! But I watched it anyway! J-just cause I was
bored and it happened to be on the TV!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, since you weren't in the Japanese Oaks,
I swore I'd find another race to settle our score...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
So hurry up and get better, okay? You're tough,
so I'm sure you'll heal up in no time.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
While you're recovering from your setback, I'm
going to be getting stronger! I'll be so strong that
you'll definitely want to run against me!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Just wait until fall. I'm not letting you off the hook. Or more like, you'll be begging to race me!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And I'll be the one to walk away victorious. You'd
better be ready.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Scarlet...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
All right. I have no idea what's gonna happen, but
this is me we're talkin' about.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: When the time comes, I'll be there to run.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hmph. I'm holding you to that.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
See you later. You'll be sleeping here tonight,
won't you? Go ahead and get some rest. I'll take
your suitcases back to our room.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Man, she's a fiery one. But... I think I might have
caused her some trouble.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
And you too, Trainer. After all you did to get us
ready to go.
choice_data_list:
Don't worry about it. There's never a dull
moment with you.

Don't worry about it. There's never a dull
moment with you.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Haha. You sure are crazy, partner. Completely different from her.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Welp, I guess I'll be sleeping in my own lameness
tonight. I'm sure the sun will come out again
someday...
